response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Confirmed that only ambient Minecraft instrumental background music is present. No songs with vocals are played. 3. Divided the video into six distinct scenes based on visual shifts in the gameplay actions: shopping, exploring/tree chopping, explaining/walking, entering the town, interacting with the NPC, and resuming exploration. 4. Since no vocal music exists, all music-related fields in the JSON are set to null.
response.global_summary: A stream recording of a VTuber playing on a Japanese Minecraft server, featuring gameplay, dialogue in Japanese and English, and exploration of the server's town and landscape. Throughout the video, only instrumental ambient background music is present; no vocal music is played.

scenes.description: The stream begins with the performer interacting with a 'Buy' shop menu in Minecraft.
The performer exits the shop area, walks through a gate into an open field, and begins chopping down an oak tree.
The performer continues to explore the open landscape while explaining game mechanics and answering questions from viewers.
The performer walks back into the central town area.
The performer enters a building and interacts with a villager NPC to reset their job level.
The performer leaves the building, returns to the open landscape, and resumes harvesting materials.
